name: Golden Cheddar Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the corn meal and flour. Mix in the baking powder and salt.
2. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until just combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, melted butter, and beaten egg.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
5. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 425 degrees F (220 degrees C) for 35 minutes.
8. Serve hot from the oven.
